etymology.description: 霝 (phonetic) + 玉 (original semantic 'jade') -> later 巫 ('witch') used as semantic in current form -> final form 靈
etymology.interpretation: The character 靈 originally combined a phonetic element with a semantic component that suggested something precious or revered, like 玉(jade). Over time, the semantic component evolved to 巫, associating the character with spirituality or otherworldly power.
etymology.simplification: 靈(靈) was simplified to 灵 by removing the semantic component 巫(巫) and retaining the core phonetic element of 霝.

examples.chinese: 这个药非常灵(這個藥非常靈)。
他的方法真灵(他的方法真靈)！
她的灵感总是很灵(她的靈感總是很靈)。
examples.pinyin: Tā de línggǎn zǒngshì hěn líng.
examples.english: Her inspiration is always very effective.
